title: hieracium sabaudum subsp. cumuliflorum
intro: Hieracium sabaudum subsp. cumuliflorum is a subspecies of the Hieracium sabaudum plant, belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits associated with Hieracium sabaudum subsp. cumuliflorum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
